name: Curried Cheese Fondue
recipeIngredient: Pieces of Nan bread, to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with cut clove of garlic.
2. Pour in wine and lemon juice and heat gently until bubbling.
3. Reduce the heat to low, add curry paste, and gradually stir in grated cheeses.
4. Continue to heat until cheeses melt, stirring frequently.
5. In a small bowl, blend cornflour smoothly with sherry.
6. Stir this mixture into the cheese mixture and continue to cook for 2-3 minutes until smooth, stirring frequently.
7. Do not allow the fondue to boil.
8. Serve with pieces of Nan bread. (Serves 4-6)
